author: Taeho JE
name: Adaptive Eval Context MLX WIP
blurb: Non-record local Apple Silicon MLX submission using adaptive eval-time context on a 9x512 SP-1024 KV4 model. In a 200-step fixed-step proxy on 1 train shard and the first 32,768 validation tokens, the adaptive final roundtrip eval scored 2.40284524 BPB vs 2.41303630 for the same setup with standard final eval.
